title: Auth Session Artifact
description: Non-secret, inspectable metadata about an acquired auth session. The decoupling contract between credential acquirers (which emit a conforming artifact) and inspectors (which validate and parse it). MUST NOT contain token values, secrets, signatures, or identifiers.

schema_version.description: MAJOR.MINOR of this contract. Minor = additive/optional fields only; major = required-field add/rename/remove or semantic change.

emitted_at.description: When the emitter produced this artifact (RFC 3339 / ISO 8601).

emitter.description: Provenance of the tool that produced the artifact.

name.description: Emitter tool name (e.g. an acquirer tool). Not a secret.

expires_at.description: Weakest OBSERVABLE-link expiry across the tokens. Null if no observable layer has a known expiry. Excludes 'unmeasured' layers, which are present but never participate in the weakest-link computation.

tokens.description: Per-layer, value-stripped metadata for each token/credential in the session.

token.$comment: additionalProperties:false is the structural 'no value fields' invariant: an emitter that adds value/SecretAccessKey/SessionToken/raw-JWT produces a NON-CONFORMING artifact. Consumers reject it loudly and never normalize it. Permanent across all schema versions.

kind.description: Token category. 'unmeasured' is first-class for off-disk, browser-held upstream-IdP sessions; it is not 'healthy' and is excluded from the weakest-link.

source.description: Provenance category, NOT a secret or identifier. Closed enum (not free text), so 'no identifier in the artifact' stays structural for source too — same hardening as dropping `label`. New sources extend via a minor bump.

expires_at.description: Observable expiry for this layer; null if unknown or unmeasured.

expiry_basis.description: How expires_at was determined. 'unmeasured' indicates no observable expiry exists for this layer.

allOf.$comment: Coherence: an 'unmeasured' layer is unmeasured in BOTH kind and expiry_basis and has no observable expiry. kind=unmeasured => expiry_basis=unmeasured and expires_at=null.
Inverse coupling: expiry_basis=unmeasured => kind=unmeasured and expires_at=null. Stops a measured kind from claiming an unmeasured basis or carrying a stray timestamp.

jwtClaims.description: Decoded JWT PAYLOAD claims, non-PII subset only. No signature, no verification key. sub/email and other PII redacted or omitted by default.
